/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fsanitize=thread,undefined CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/tests/raft_node_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/raft_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/randomizer.cpp.o -o raft_tests  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
